title: Foundational Knowledge
description: Focuses on structured metadata such as title, author, dynasty, museum, and medium. Evaluates the ability to retrieve and reason over core factual information of artworks.

title: Visual Content
description: Covers recognition of seals, inscriptions, visual elements, and artistic techniques. Tests fine-grained visual understanding and alignment with artistic knowledge.

title: Deep Reasoning
description: Includes visual analysis, cultural context understanding, and provenance research. Evaluates high-level reasoning that connects visual input with historical and scholarly knowledge.
